completion_promises.criterion_text: `src/fleet_memory/reindex/publisher.py` exposes a publisher that accepts a `BasePayload` and publishes a `MemoryEpisodeV1` onto the MEMORY stream
completion_promises.evidence: The `publish_episode(payload: BasePayload)` function exists at line 39 and publishes to MEMORY stream at line 79. Verified by test_episode_is_json_with_payload_type which confirms MemoryEpisodeV1 structure.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The published episode has `content_format == "json"` and `payload_type == payload.payload_type`, so `RelayService._ingest_json` routes it to the `DeterministicWriter` rather than the prose chunker
completion_promises.evidence: Line 72 sets content_format to literal 'json', line 74 sets payload_type from payload.payload_type. Verified by test_episode_is_json_with_payload_type which asserts episode.content_format == 'json' and episode.payload_type == 'adr'.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `body` is the payload's canonical JSON serialization and round-trips: `get_model_for_type(episode.payload_type)(**json.loads(episode.body))` reconstructs an equal payload
completion_promises.evidence: Lines 62-66 serialize with model_dump(mode='json'), sort_keys=True for canonical representation. test_body_round_trips_through_registry verifies round-trip equality: reconstructed payload equals original.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `source_ref` carries the source document reference; `episode_id` is derived deterministically from the payload `natural_key` (so a re-publish of the same parsed document is idempotent at the JetStream Msg-Id layer as well as downstream)
completion_promises.evidence: Line 75 sets source_ref from payload.source_ref. Lines 23-36 implement _derive_episode_id using SHA-256 hash of natural_key. test_episode_id_deterministic_for_natural_key verifies same natural_key produces same episode_id across multiple publishes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: No language-model, cloud, or frontier-model request is made by the publisher (asserted by test — e.g. no network egress / no LLM client constructed)
completion_promises.evidence: Implementation contains no network calls, LLM clients, or external API requests. Only uses hashlib, json (stdlib), and broker.publish (mocked in tests). test_no_network_calls_during_publish verifies no network activity during publish.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `tests/unit/reindex/test_publisher.py` asserts content_format, payload_type, body round-trip, and deterministic episode_id
completion_promises.evidence: Test file contains all required tests: test_episode_is_json_with_payload_type (content_format + payload_type), test_body_round_trips_through_registry (body round-trip), test_episode_id_deterministic_for_natural_key (deterministic ID). All 5 tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check' on both src/fleet_memory/reindex/publisher.py and tests/unit/reindex/test_publisher.py. Result: 'All checks passed!' with zero errors.
